name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools churn out visually bland, templated slides that look machine-made and undermine credibility. Chronicle 2.0 gives teams a way to create compelling, design-forward presentations quickly without sacrificing quality or brand integrity. It targets professionals who need speed but refuse to compromise on visual standards.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks with a distinctive, non-generic visual style
Building client-facing presentations that reflect brand identity
Rapidly drafting internal strategy or roadmap decks
Producing sales enablement materials at scale without a dedicated designer
